creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 184190
CSV of VPN servers that cannot access https://forums.freebsd.org

I use NordVPN (https://nordvpn.com) most of the time when I'm accessing the Internet.  I've noticed that sometimes https://forums.freebsd.org was unavailable.  I've tracked this down to a number of the VPN servers I use to connect to the FreeBSD forums.

I've tested all of the UK NordVPN servers and have made a list of those that cannot access the FreeBSD forums, there are 29.  The list is attached in CSV format (with headers), the format is:
vpn server name,vpn server IP, curl message

These IPs are valid, but I suspect that the FreeBSD forums are blocking them.  Please can they be unblocked as a number of them get auto-selected by my VPN client (the official NordVPN client).

@FreeBSDHelp advised I open a ticket (https://twitter.com/FreeBSDHelp/status/877116717951893504), apologies it has taken so long!

If I can find time, I shall also try the other NordVPN servers.  However there are >2000 so I need to find a better way to automate the process than what I used for this.
